errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.message: Caller lacks permission to perform this action

errors.message: Admin has already been initialised

errors.name: MerchantNotFound
errors.message: Merchant is not registered

errors.message: A merchant with this address is already registered

errors.message: Merchant account is deactivated

errors.name: PaymentAlreadyExists

errors.message: Signature verification failed

errors.name: PaymentExpired

errors.message: The 30-day refund window has passed

errors.name: RefundAmountExceedsPayment
errors.message: Cumulative refund amount exceeds the original payment

errors.name: RefundNotApproved

errors.message: Refund has already been completed or rejected

errors.name: MultisigNotFound

errors.name: InsufficientSignatures

errors.name: ArithmeticError
